  • Constructor Details

    • NeedTest

      public NeedTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testDefaultConstructor

      public void testDefaultConstructor()
      Tests the default constructor. Verifies that the need is initialized with default value of 80 and decay rate of 0.5.

    • testCustomDecayConstructor

      public void testCustomDecayConstructor()
      Tests the constructor with custom decay rate. Verifies that the need is initialized with default value of 80 and the specified decay rate.

    • testFullCustomConstructor

      public void testFullCustomConstructor()
      Tests the full custom constructor. Verifies that the need is initialized with the specified value, decay rate, and threshold.

    • testGetValue

      public void testGetValue()
      Tests the getValue method. Ensures that the correct need values are returned for different need instances.

    • testGetDecayRate

      public void testGetDecayRate()
      Tests the getDecayRate method. Ensures that the correct decay rates are returned for different need instances.

    • testSetValueNormalIncrease

      public void testSetValueNormalIncrease()
      Tests the setValue method with a normal increase. Verifies that adding a positive value increases the need correctly.

    • testSetValueNormalDecrease

      public void testSetValueNormalDecrease()
      Tests the setValue method with a normal decrease. Verifies that subtracting a positive value decreases the need correctly.

    • testSetValueClampToMax

      public void testSetValueClampToMax()
      Tests the setValue method clamping to maximum. Verifies that the value is clamped to 100 when it would exceed the maximum.

    • testSetValueClampToMin

      public void testSetValueClampToMin()
      Tests the setValue method clamping to minimum. Verifies that the value is clamped to 0 when it would go below the minimum.

    • testSetValueExactMax

      public void testSetValueExactMax()
      Tests the setValue method setting to exact maximum. Verifies that setting to exactly 100 is allowed.

    • testSetValueExactMin

      public void testSetValueExactMin()
      Tests the setValue method setting to exact minimum. Verifies that setting to exactly 0 is allowed.

    • testPerformDecayDefault

      public void testPerformDecayDefault()
      Tests the performDecay method with default settings. Verifies that decay reduces the value by the decay rate and returns false for non-critical state.

    • testPerformDecayCustomRate

      public void testPerformDecayCustomRate()
      Tests the performDecay method with custom decay rate. Verifies that decay uses the custom rate and returns false for non-critical state.

    • testPerformDecayBelowThreshold

      public void testPerformDecayBelowThreshold()
      Tests the performDecay method when value goes below threshold. Verifies that decay reduces value and returns true for critical state.

    • testPerformDecayAtThreshold

      public void testPerformDecayAtThreshold()
      Tests the performDecay method when value is at threshold. Verifies that decay reduces value below threshold and returns true for critical state.

    • testPerformDecayMultipleTimes

      public void testPerformDecayMultipleTimes()
      Tests the performDecay method over multiple decays. Verifies progressive decay and the transition to critical state.

    • testPerformDecayClamping

      public void testPerformDecayClamping()
      Tests the performDecay method with clamping to minimum. Verifies that decay clamps the value to 0 and returns true for critical state.

    • testZeroDecayRate

      public void testZeroDecayRate()
      Tests the performDecay method with zero decay rate. Verifies that no decay occurs and returns false for non-critical state.
